templates.name: How do I redeem my Rivet (reward) points?
templates.content: You can redeem your Rivet Points for discounts on select products available on the Rivet Club page only. In order to redeem your points for a certain product, you need to have the total number of points shown below each item.

templates.name: Payment methods
templates.content: We offer payment methods via PayPal, Affirm, Afterpay, Amazon pay, and credit cards.

templates.name: Restock button (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend checking our website and social media frequently.

templates.name: When will I get my Rivetts?
templates.content: Sometimes the Rivetts take a bit of time to enter you loyalty account. Please check back later and they should be there. Thanks for being part of the Rivett Club.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our items are designed in Los Angeles and manufactured in Asia.

templates.name: Are core items part of the Retiring Styles Event?
templates.content: Potentially a few retiring core silhouettes.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.hammitt.com/pages/stockists

templates.name: Are retiring styles final sale?
templates.content: All products in the retiring styles event are final sale. During this special event, our Retiring Styles with exclusive pricing are ineligible for return or exchange.

templates.name: Which wallet can fit The Duke?
templates.content: The Montana Pocket, 110 North, 210, and Levy Sml are all great wallet options for the Duke and other crossbody styles.

templates.name: Do you have other reward options?
templates.content: At this time, the only reward options include what is currently listed on the rewards page. We aim to change our reward options quarterly.

templates.name: Can the Levy fit inside the Dillon Medium?
templates.content: Yes, the Levy can indeed fit inside the Dillon medium.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Material composition of The Nathan/Salata Toile
templates.content: The Salata Toile is made of two-tone Italian cotton.

templates.name: Is there a try now option?
templates.content: You can check out our try now option here: https://hammitt.attn.tv/sl/L6h5K7nL - You will only be charged for items you decide to keep at the end of your 7-day trial period (7 day period starts the day your package is delivered)!

templates.name: Which is better for cleaning your leather? Spray or balm?
templates.content: We recommend having a local leather care professional take a look and see what they can do/advise for your bag!

templates.name: Are retail stores participating in the a Retiring Styles Event?
templates.content:
The retail stores can sell products off the iPad but not
have any Retiring Styles Event products in store.

templates.name: What iPhone sizes can fit into the Levy phone pocket?
templates.content: All iPhones fit inside the phone pockets, however the top of your phone may peak out of the pocket depending on your phone size.

templates.name: Material composition of the Nathan/Coastal Alliance
templates.content: For that specific model, the Raffia clutch is made of true Raffia and the front clutch is all leather.

templates.name: If someone asks about the Retiring Styles Event before it starts
templates.content: I'm afraid I don't have any information on that, but make sure you are subscribed to our newsletters for promotions.

templates.name: Can I use Affirm or Afterpay (financing) for the Retiring Styles Event?
templates.content: Yes, Affirm and Afterpay are available for Retiring Styles.

templates.name: Is the Pistachio leather stiff?
templates.content: The Pistachio leather is a stiffer, more structured leather, and it feels similar to our lizard leathers.

templates.name: Can I use a spray/conditioner on the Duke or on pebbled leather?
templates.content: We recommend treating our pebbled leather with the leather laundry conditioner and/or spray every few months to preserve the quality and softness of the leather.

templates.name: Warranty / Repair Policy
templates.content: Every Hammitt is covered by our lifetime warranty which you can see in detail here - https://www.hammitt.com/pages/repair-policy

templates.name: What is the Ornament used for?
templates.content: You may use the ornament as a coin purse, mini wallet, etc!

templates.name: Is the leather pre-treated
templates.content: We do not pre-treat any of our leathers to ensure that they are feeling as soft as possible! Our signature pebbled leather is one of the softest buttery leathers there is! As for the Nubuck leather, like that in our pewter colorway, it's known to have a beautiful natural leather patina that develops with age and the bag's personal journey. It's a very soft leather that tends to absorb color if left untreated.

templates.name: Can I use TryNow for the Retiring Styles Event OR add Monograming to my Retiring Styles products?
templates.content: TryNow and monogramming are not available for Retiring Styles.

templates.name: Can I have express/expedited shipping for the Retiring styles event?
templates.content:
We do not offer express/expedited shipping for the
Retiring Styles Event.

templates.name: How rough is the Redwood Lizard leather?
templates.content: The Redwood Lizard is textured, but still has a considerably smooth finish.

templates.name: Which wallet can fit into a small Becker
templates.content: The Levy small, 110 North, and Montana Pocket are all good wallet options for the Becker.

templates.name: Will the Hunter Medium fit a water bottle, sunglasses, wallets, etc?
templates.content: The Hunter medium will fit all of your personal items, as well as a small water bottle.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via UPS, USPS and FedEx, and once shipped it will take 5-7 business days. Keep in mind, processing time for personalized items is 3-5 business days before they ship.

templates.name: Is the Botanical Snake leather stiff?
templates.content: Botanical Snake is a soft leather.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't specifically have discounts for that but make sure you are subscribed to our newsletters for promotions.

templates.name: Weight of the Levy Small in Botanical Snake
templates.content: The Levy small in Botanical Snake weighs about .59 lbs.

templates.name: Which wallets can fit into the Tony Small?
templates.content: The Montana Pocket and Levy small are great for the Tony small.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 833-HAMMITT (833-426-6488) or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/hammittla and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/hammittla

templates.name: How long is the Nathan chain strap (Mosaic/Sequin variant)
templates.content: The chain strap can be adjusted from 39"-51".

templates.name: Strap length of The Nathan (all leather variant)
templates.content: The strap is 49" long and has a maximum 24" drop length.

templates.name: Are the wallets RFID protected.
templates.content: Our wallets are not RFID protected.

templates.name: Are there price adjustments for the Retiring sales event?
templates.content:
If we adjust pricing on a style you've already purchased because it is
retiring, we will gladly adjust your purchase price by request within 14 days of your original purchase date.

templates.name: When will my exchange order ship out?
templates.content: An exchange order is not shipped until the return shipment has been processed.

templates.name: What are the offers for the Retiring Styles Event?
templates.content:
Our Retiring Styles Event features exclusive pricing on all of our limited edition seasonal collections! During these rare events, we bring back
some of our collections from seasons prior, giving everyone a last chance to snag their wishlist items at a very special price! (40% OFF) You can check it out here: https://www.hammitt.com/collections/retiring-styles-event

templates.name: When someone asks about sales
templates.content: I don't have any information on that, but make sure you are subscribed to our newsletters for promotions.

templates.name: Does the 110 North fit inside the VIP LRG?
templates.content: The 110 North fits great inside the VIP LRG!

templates.name: Can I cancel my Retiring Style order after purchase?
templates.content: Due to high order volume, I'm afraid that once an order is in the process of fulfillment, no edits or cancellations can be made.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.hammitt.com/pages/loyalty

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.hammitt.com/pages/returns-exchanges

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for a wholesale account here - https://www.hammitt.com/pages/wholesale-contact-us For other wholesale inquiries, please email us directly at wholesale@hammitt.com.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at wecare@hammitt.com or give us a call at 833-HAMMITT (833-426-6488). Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can I get reward points for purchases made at the store
templates.content: At this time, points may only be earned through purchases made directly through Hammitt.com.

templates.name: I know I have points, but when I try to log in, I get an error that says my email address is not registered
templates.content: This usually happens when an account has not been set up with that email. Please try to make an account with that specific email address and all your points should reflect accordingly. Let me know how it goes and if you need any additional assistance, I'll be glad to help.

templates.name: How do I clean my bag?
templates.content: Check out our signature leather laundry protectant: https://hammitt.attn.tv/sl/cQe84mhK and conditioner : https://hammitt.attn.tv/sl/PKcrk8ic Each arrives with helpful instructions to keep your bag looking brand new!

templates.name: When does the sale end? (for Retiring sales event)
templates.content: I don't have an end date for you at this time, but styles are selling out every hour and they won't be coming back in stock.

templates.name: How do I leave a review?
templates.content: In order to leave a review, first make sure you're logged into our rewards program so we can award you points, then, you must go to the specific product listing on our website. Once you're on the product page, scroll down and select "write a review".

templates.name: Are your bags sold on Amazon? (Why can't I get prime next day shipping)?
templates.content: Our bags are indeed available for purchase on Amazon. Due to the supply chain, it's likely that some bags may not be available for prime next day shipping.

templates.name: Weight of the Daniel Large and Daniel Medium
templates.content: The Daniel large weighs 2.65 lbs while the Daniel medium weighs 2.25 lbs.

templates.name: Weight of the AJ crossbody clutch
templates.content: The AJ Crossbody Clutch weighs 1.72 lbs.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: Not yet, but stay tuned!

templates.name: Where is your repair center located?
templates.content: All repairs are completed in Hermosa Beach, California.

templates.name: How long will it take for my bag to be repaired?
templates.content: On average, it takes about 2-4 weeks for our team to complete a standard repair. We'll keep you in the loop every step of the way, and you'll receive an email when your bag begins its journey back to your door.

templates.name: Do you offer returns and repairs in-store?
templates.content: Yes! Bring your bag in, and we'll be happy to help!

templates.name: Do you ship to P.O. Boxes?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't ship to P.O. Boxes.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here - https://hammitt.attn.tv/sl/FGOFodA0

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all domestic orders.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at wecare@hammitt.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Shipping delays during Retiring Styles Event
templates.content: Due to a very high influx of orders, we're experiencing some delays. We sincerely apologize! Our shipping team is working hard to ensure your order will ship as soon as possible. Thank you for your kind understanding and for being an extraordinary part of our Hammitt family!

templates.name: Leather Laundry on Suede
templates.content: The leather laundry conditioner isn't recommended for use on suede leather, however, you can use the waterproofing spray - https://www.hammitt.com/products/leather-laundry-leather-protectant-lrg Just make sure not to spray it too close to avoid spots. We recommend a light mist to cover it.

templates.name: Complaining about pricing
templates.content: We understand. Enjoy if you decide to go for it at any point!

templates.name: Do you offer expedited shipping?
templates.content: Shipping carriers across the country are experiencing high demand and delays. We cannot confidently endorse expedited shipping at this time, so we recommend shopping for gifts as early as possible!

templates.name: Welcome Code Inquiry
templates.content: The 10% discount is exclusively for new email and SMS subscribers. If you've subscribed before, I'm afraid you won't be eligible for the code. If this is your first time signing up for both, please check your spam and promotions folders for the code. Let me know how it goes!
